calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 501 for commencement of short cause trial/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:19:56 a.m. and concluding at 11:24:05 a.m.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic represented by Howard Olsen, Esq.
Defendant Roger Moussa not appearing.

KIMBERLY VILLEGAS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, and against Defendant Roger Moussa, as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is entitled to possession of the property located at 520 South Van Ness Avenue, #348, San Francisco, CA 94110, City and County of San Francisco.

Proposed Judgment signed by the Court and served in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Off Calendar
